cases.name: http-without-local-boundary
expected: HTTP Vault transport requires local-only annotations

cases.name: broad-token-reviewer
expected: TokenReview binding must contain exactly one subject

cases.name: wildcard-policy
expected: Vault policy must not contain wildcard platform paths

cases.name: insecure-bootstrap
expected: bootstrap must not disable Vault TLS verification

cases.name: token-in-argv
expected: bootstrap must not place Vault token in argv

cases.name: secret-in-env
expected: bootstrap must not accept or export Vault token environment input

cases.name: secret-in-kubectl-argv
expected: bootstrap must not place generated secret values in kubectl argv
